title: Maw Bank
description: Whenever you climb a floor, gain [blue]12[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. No longer works when you spend any [gold]Gold[/gold] at the shop.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: The relic grants 12 Gold when first entering the shop floor during a run. Once any Gold is spent at the shop, the relic becomes disabled and no longer grants the bonus for subsequent floors.
